title: stephanomeria tenuifolia var. myrioclada
intro: Stephanomeria tenuifolia var. myrioclada is a perennial plant species commonly known as California wirelettuce or California buckwheat, belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Stephanomeria tenuifolia var. myrioclada lie in its ability to stimulate the digestive system and promote the excretion of bile, which can aid in treating conditions such as constipation and gallstones. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Traditional herbal preparations of Stephanomeria tenuifolia var. myrioclada include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
